rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 232, 232), rgb(38, 38, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 128px; height: 1px; padding-top: 55px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(245, 245, 245), rgb(26, 26, 26)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 128px; height: 1px; padding-top: 129px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
